data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement that the provider doesn't see the name until in-person.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that 'Provider doesn't see name until in-person'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations that this functionality has been implemented. The linked use case describes the need for anonymity, but there is no direct evidence that this requirement has been satisfied in the current saga run, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the provider does not see the real name until in-person.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement that the provider doesn't see the name until in-person.
